title: Bridge Essay: My body in the brain: a neurocognitive model of body-ownership.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, body ownership as constructed percept.
**Phase context:** Body as constructed percept — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership plasticity.

**My body in the brain: a neurocognitive model of body-ownership.** — Neuropsychologia (2010). DOI: 10.1016/j.neuropsychologia.2009.09.034. PMID: 19819247. Empirical research on the bodily self has only recently started to investigate how the link between a body and the experience of this body as mine is developed, maintained or disturbed. The Rubber Hand Illusion has been used as a model instance of the normal sense of embodiment to investigate the processes that underpin the experience of body-ownership.
